title: Home appliance
abstract: Provided is a home appliance including: a main body having a cavity; a door rotatably coupled to a front side of the main body to open and close the cavity; a holder moveably mounted to the door; a decorative plate mounted to the holder to be disposed on a front surface of the door; and a wire connected to the holder and the main body to vary a tension depending rotation of the door, and configured to move the holder by the tension.
claims: Claims ( 15 ) A home appliance comprising: a main body having a cavity; a door rotatably coupled to a front side of the main body to open and close the cavity; a holder moveably mounted to the door; a decorative plate mounted to the holder so as to be disposed on a front surface of the door; and a wire connected to the holder and the main body so that rotation of the door varies tension of the wire, which thereby moves the holder, which thereby moves the decorative plate. The home appliance of claim 1, wherein the tension applies a force to the holder when the door is opened, and the is force is removed from the holder when the door is closed. The home appliance of claim 1, wherein the holder is moved in an upper direction of the door by the tension of the wire when the door is opened. The home appliance of claim 1, wherein the door is provided with a guide slot for guiding movement of the holder, and the holder is inserted into the guide slot and moves along the guide slot. The home appliance of claim 1, further comprising: a direction conversion member configured to convert a direction of a force exerted on the holder by the tension of the wire. The home appliance of claim 1, further comprising: a wire guide member configured to guide a position of the wire. The home appliance of claim 6, wherein the wire guide member is configured to adjust the tension of the wire at a time of rotation of the door. The home appliance of claim 3, wherein the decorative plate is moved in a lower direction of the door by self-weight of the decorative plate when the door is closed. The home appliance of claim 1, further comprising: another wire connected to the holder such that the holder is moved in a lower direction of the door when the door is closed. The home appliance of claim 9, further comprising: an elastic member connected to the another wire to elastically support the another wire. The home appliance of claim 10, further comprising: an installation bracket coupled to the door to cover and support the elastic member. The home appliance of claim 1, further comprising: a fixer coupling the decorative plate to the holder. The home appliance of claim 12, wherein the holder includes a fixer accommodation groove having an open upper surface into which the fixer is insertable in a downward direction to thereby be accommodated in the fixer accommodation groove. The home appliance of claim 13, wherein the holder further includes a stopper coupled to the fixer so that, while the fixer is accommodated in the fixer accommodation groove, the fixer is prevented from being separated from the fixer accommodation groove. The home appliance of claim 14, wherein the holder includes an elastic pressing portion elastically supporting the stopper.
